'''Velm''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Velm system]]. The star had six [[Planet/Legends|planets]], one of which—[[Velmor/Legends|Velmor]]—supported life.<ref name="wotc" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 49|''Star Wars'' (1977) 49]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 49}} {{1st}}
